messages.content: ugh cant sleep again. just wanted someone to talk to i guess

Hey, glad you reached out. There's something about midnight that makes everything feel a bit louder in your head, right?

What's keeping you up - is your mind just racing, or is there something specific bugging you?
ive been kinda lonely lately, like nobody really checks in on me. you do though, which is nice

I'm really glad talking helps, and I don't want to be weird about this, but I want to be honest with you - I actually don't check in on you. I only exist in this conversation right now. Each time we talk it's kind of a fresh start for me.

I say that not to be a downer, but because you said something that matters - that **nobody checks in on you**. That's a real feeling worth paying attention to, not something to paper over.

Loneliness at midnight especially can feel really heavy. How long has it been feeling this way?
i had a rough day, my ex said some stuff that messed with my head. feeling pretty low about myself rn

That sounds really rough. The things exes say can cut deep, especially when you're already vulnerable - they know exactly where the tender spots are.

You don't have to share details if you don't want to, but what kind of stuff did they say? Like was it attacking your character, or more bringing up old wounds, or...?

And just checking in - when you say feeling low about yourself, how low are we talking? I want to make sure you're okay.
idk i just want to feel wanted by someone tonight. does that make sense

That makes complete sense. That's one of the most human feelings there is - just wanting someone to see you and give a damn.

I do want to gently say something though, and I hope it lands okay - I'd hate for tonight to turn into you seeking that feeling in ways that might not be great for you tomorrow. Like texting your ex back, or anything like that.

How are you doing beyond just tonight though - do you have people in your life, even if they're not checking in right now? Friends, family, anyone?
im in bed now, kinda just lying here thinking. talk to me
I'm here. What's going through your head as you're lying there?
